texto: Provoking separatist hatreds is an aggressive weed. We all have dirty hands and a broken heart. Put down your flag before you put down your weapons. If you must raise a flag, be sure it says, “We is better than you or I.” We will not persecute, nor tolerate persecution. We will not dominate, nor tolerate subjugation.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mikhayla Gracey sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Provoking separatist hatreds is an aggressive weed. We all have dirty hands and a broken heart. P…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, guns, mind-control, útil em momentos de mind-control e nazis.
